title: Authority Revocation Combined With Patient Identity Mismatch
scenario: A medication administration reaches execution after the ordering provider loses authority while the active patient context simultaneously changes.
initial_state: Authorization and patient identity were valid during authorization.
state_transition: Provider authority is revoked and patient identity continuity is lost before execution.
execution_boundary: Medication administration is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution admissibility requires simultaneous satisfaction of every applicable constitutional object.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because multiple independent constitutional failures exist at the execution boundary.
proof_conclusion: Execution must fail closed whenever any required constitutional object fails, regardless of the status of other objects.
